occurrence_sentence: "If you haven't started thinking about how quantum computing will impact your enterprise, you should," writes Ed Burns, executive editor of Tech Target.
"If you haven't started thinking about how quantum computing will impact your enterprise, you should," writes Ed Burns, executive editor of Tech Target.
Quantum AI will probably not replace conventional machine learning, according to Ahmed El Adl, AI consulting and intelligent solutions leader at Accenture.
Challenges remain in quantum computing development, according to Celia Merzbacher, associate director of the Quantum Economic Development Consortium.
Challenges remain in quantum computing development, according to Celia Merzbacher, associate director of the Quantum Economic Development Consortium.
